##SOURCE=Michael Scott
##DESCRIPTION=Spherical aggregate of pale greenish-blue tabular crystals

##URL=https://www.rruff.net/odr/rruff_sample/R060263
##MEASURED CHEMISTRY=Ni^2+^_1.00_(Sb^5+^_1.99_As_0.01_)(OH)_12_·1.2H_2_O ; = gray phase. (dehydrated bottinoite due to the electronic beam)
